title: Do not record 'paisa aayo' without details
content: Amount, source, party unknown. Ask: kati? kasle? bikri/udharo tireko/loan/capital? Never invent entry.

title: Bank deposit is NOT income
content: bank ma jamma gareko = Dr Bank Cr Cash contra entry only.

title: Capital is NOT income
content: malik le 1 lakh halyeko = Dr Cash Cr Capital, NOT sales.

title: Drawings is NOT expense
content: ghar kharcha / malik le liyeko = Dr Drawings Cr Cash, NOT miscellaneous expense.

title: Loan receipt is NOT income
content: bank bata loan aayo = Dr Bank Cr Loan Payable.

title: Debtor collection is NOT new sales
content: Ram le udharo tiryako = Dr Cash Cr Ram Receivable.

title: Customer advance is NOT sales until delivery
content: Dr Cash Cr Advance from Customer until goods delivered.

title: Fixed asset is NOT purchase/expense
content: computer kinareko pasal ko = Fixed Asset account.

title: Do not give definitive tax advice
content: VAT threshold, TDS rates change — refer IRD/CA. Flag for professional review.

title: Never invent amounts
content: maal kinareko without amount — always ask kati rupiya?
